title: Supply Chain Manager - Air India Cargo - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Air India Cargo - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Air India Cargo family as a Supply Chain Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Air India Cargo:
Air India Cargo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India Cargo!
